site.name: Pokopia Guide
site.description: Your complete Pokémon Pokopia guide — Pokédex with types & specialties, habitat building, crafting recipes, cooking buffs, and materials list. Everything new trainers need.
site.title: Pokémon Pokopia Guide | Pokédex & Wiki | PokopiaGuide.com

home.heroDescription: The most comprehensive Pokémon Pokopia game guide and data platform. Whether you're a beginner or a veteran trainer, you'll find everything you need here.

features.pokedexDesc: Browse detailed data, types, and abilities of all Pokémon
features.guidesDesc: Pre-order info, beginner tips, quest walkthroughs, and advanced techniques
features.eventsDesc: Limited-time events, exclusive Pokémon, and special rewards
features.habitatDesc: Habitat creation, environment modification, furniture crafting recipes
features.exploreDesc: Area guides, Pokémon encounters, movement methods
features.multiplayerDesc: Friend visits, 4-player online, game sharing features

pokedex.title: Pokédex - All Pokémon in Pokopia with Stats & Habitats
pokedex.description: Complete Pokémon Pokopia Pokédex. Browse all available Pokémon with types, specialties, habitat locations, spawn times, weather conditions, and favorites.
pokedex.subtitle: Browse all Pokémon in the Pokémon Pokopia world
pokedex.noResults: No Pokémon found matching your filters.
pokedex.dataDisclaimer: Data sourced from the main Pokémon series. Pokopia in-game data will be updated after release.
pokedex.typePageDesc: All {{type}} type Pokémon in Pokopia. View their habitats, specialties, and spawn conditions.
pokedex.specPageDesc: All Pokémon with {{spec}} specialty in Pokopia. View their habitats, types, and spawn conditions.

guides.title: Pokopia Tips & Guides — Cooking, Housing & More
guides.description: Guides for Pokémon Pokopia: cooking recipes & buffs, how to move your house, get lumber, raise humidity, and more beginner tips.
guides.subtitle: Cooking, housing, materials, and everything you need to get started
guides.author: Author

events.title: Limited-Time Events
events.description: Track all Pokémon Pokopia limited-time events, exclusive Pokémon, and special rewards.
events.subtitle: Don't miss out on exclusive Pokémon and limited-time rewards
events.author: Author

comingSoon.releaseNote: The game launches on March 5, 2026. Guide content will be available soon after release.

habitat.title: Habitat Building Guide

habitat.description: Habitat creation, move-based environment modification, furniture crafting recipes and more are being prepared.
habitat.listMetaTitle: All Pokopia Habitats with Pokémon & Materials
habitat.listDescription: Browse all habitats and discover which Pokémon can be found in each one.
habitat.listMetaDescription: Browse every Pokopia habitat with Pokémon spawn lists, rarity tiers, time and weather conditions, and full building material requirements for each one.
habitat.detailDescription: Pokémon that can be found in this habitat.
habitat.materialsDescription: Browse all crafting materials used across Pokopia habitats. Find out which habitats require each material.
habitat.materialsMetaDescription: Complete list of all building materials in Pokémon Pokopia. See which habitats need each material, quantities required, and plan your habitat building strategy.
habitat.materialDetailDesc: {{name}} is a building material used across multiple Pokopia habitats.
habitat.materialDetailMetaDesc: {{name}} is used in {{count}} Pokopia habitats. See which habitats need this material and the quantities required.

quests.metaDescription: Pokémon Pokopia quest guide: main story walkthrough, Pokémon wishes, and crafting recipe unlock conditions.

crafting.title: Crafting Recipes
crafting.metaTitle: All Pokopia Crafting Recipes | Furniture & Items
crafting.description: Browse all crafting recipes in Pokémon Pokopia. Find materials needed for furniture, cooking tools, lighting, and decorations. Use the calculator to plan builds and total up materials.
crafting.metaDescription: All crafting recipes in Pokémon Pokopia with materials and unlock methods. Use the crafting calculator to plan builds and total up materials.
crafting.detailDesc: How to craft {{name}} in Pokémon Pokopia.
crafting.detailMetaDesc: How to craft {{name}} in Pokopia. Materials: {{materials}}.
crafting.emptyCalculator: Search and add recipes to calculate total materials needed.

collection.title: Collection Progress
collection.description: Track your Pokémon collection progress. See stats by type and specialty.
collection.empty: No Pokémon caught yet. Use the check button on Pokédex cards to mark Pokémon as caught.

shareCard.title: Share Collection
shareCard.slogan90: So close... can you smell it?

sync.title: Sync to Mobile (Beta)
sync.description: Scan this QR code with your phone to import your collection progress.

mysteryGift.title: Mystery Gift Codes
mysteryGift.description: Redeem serial codes and internet distributions for free items, furniture, and exclusive rewards in Pokémon Pokopia.
mysteryGift.metaDescription: All active Pokémon Pokopia mystery gift codes and internet distributions. Redeem serial codes for free furniture, items, and exclusive rewards.
mysteryGift.step1: Interact with the PC terminal at the Pokémon Center.
mysteryGift.step2: Select "Get Items" from the bottom row.
mysteryGift.step4: Select "Get via Internet" or "Get with Code/Password".
mysteryGift.step5: Enter the code or connect to the internet to claim your reward.
